calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-20-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Nichole Santiago, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY,
Witness KENDRA CRAWFORD sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant PATRICK THOMPSON,
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 175 Brookdale Avenue, San Francisco, California 94134, County of San Francisco.

Damages $0
Holdover damages $0
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $0
For a Total Judgment of $0 (waived, possession only)

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-20-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2017 Off Calendar
